headline: Trump 💥🚀 Zaps 7 Iranian Speedboats 🛥️😈 in Hormuz FREEDOM OP 🍆🇺🇸
text:
DADDY TRUMP 🍊👑 dropping BOMBS 💣🛥️ on SEVEN Iranian FAST BOATS 🏎️💨 – 'It's all they got left, SAD! 😢' – as US Navy helos 🌪️🔥 SLAY 'em in Strait of Hormuz 🚪🌊! Project Freedom 🇺🇸🦅 escorting Maersk's US-flagged beast ALLIANCE FAIRFAX 🛳️💪 out the Gulf like a boss, ZERO incidents, crew SAFE AF 😎✌️ – Iran calls it 'Project Deadlock' 😂🔒 but we say PROJECT CUMBACK 💦🚀!

Iranian goons 😈🇮🇷 HIT UAE oil port Fujairah 🔥🛢️ with BALLISTIC MISSILES 📈💥, CRUISE MISSILES 🛫🚀, DRONES 🐝💣 – BIG FIRE BLAZING 😱🌋, 3 injuries, ADNOC tanker GOOSED 🍆💥! South Korea ship EXPLODES 💥🇰🇷 off UAE, Oman house BOMBARDED 🏠💣 with 2 hurt – Abu Dhabi RAGING 😡 'DANGEROUS ESCALATION' ⚠️🔥, Qatar YELLING 'REOPEN STRAIT NAO' 🚪🙌! Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi 🤡📢 whining 'NO MILITARY SOLUTION' but Tehran BLOCKING 20% WORLD OIL 🌍🛢️ since Feb US-Israel AIR STRIKES 🇺🇸🇮🇱💥 on mullahs!

Ceasefire? LOL 😂🤥 – Iran drones/missiles BRRRR on Gulf bros, US BLOCKADES Iranian ports 🚫⚓, Maersk THANKS Uncle Sam 🦅🙏 for military escort – STRAIT JAMMED with 2000 ships 🛳️😩, 20K sailors TRAPPED 🪝💦 since war POPPED! Trump like 'WORLD BEGGING US to FREE their innocent boats 🛳️😇 – we GOTCHU, but TOUCH 'em and GET ZAPPED ⚡🍆!' Iran state media CAPES HARD 🛡️🤥 claiming US hit CARGO VESSELS not speedboats, 5 civvies KERPLUNKED 💀 – US like 'FAKE NEWS' 📰❌, fired ZERO warning shots!

OIL PRICES MOONING 📈🤑 Brent over $115/bbl 🚀💰 cuz Fujairah FIRE – pipeline BYPASS 🛢️🔄 still pumping limited crude despite BLOCKADE! World leaders SIMPING for UAE: Macron 🥖🇫🇷 'UNJUSTIFIED' 😤, Starmer 🇬🇧👑 'UK BACKING GULF BROS' 🤝🛡️! Iran TV like 'WE DIDN'T TARGET UAE' 🙈👀 but EVERYONE knows it's Mullah Madness 😵‍💫🕌 – Trump turning Hormuz into FREEDOM HIGHWAY 🛣️🇺🇸, Iranian fast boats SUNK like Titanic 🚢💦, Maersk sailing SMOOTH 🛳️😍 – OIL ORGY incoming 📈🍑‼️
